hypothesis: Trend Industrials restoration fails mainly because small Industrials entries displace stronger trades or alter portfolio path, not because their own small PnL alone explains the regression.

window_findings.interpretation: No displacement occurred; small Industrials entries were mildly positive.
Industrials restoration added weak trades and removed a stronger AMD trend trade.
Industrials restoration added several weak trades and displaced major winners in APP and GLD.

mechanism_insight: The broad trend Industrials zero-risk rule is protecting scarce portfolio capacity. The bad mechanism is low-priority signal pollution and path/slot displacement, not merely direct Industrials trade loss.
do_not_repeat: Do not retest broad non-zero trend Industrials multipliers.
Do not combine Industrials restoration with generic scarce-slot sorting; exp-20260427-019 through exp-20260427-028 already narrowed that family.
A valid retry needs a genuinely new discriminator that predicts when Industrials trend entries will not displace higher-quality existing sleeves.
